title: Crossword Bookstores is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Crossword Bookstores is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Crossword Bookstores in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Crossword Bookstores:
Crossword Bookstores is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crossword Bookstores!
